title: Vault Survival Contract
description: Canonical contract for uDOS vault crash survival, .compost format, progressive file versioning, sandbox protocol, snap-off, and reconnect. Owner: uDOS-core.

compost_header.title: Compost Header Record
compost_header.description: First line of a .compost file. Identifies the vault and the version vector at snapshot time.

vault_id.description: Stable vault identity token. Format: vault-<slug>.

version_vector.description: Map of surface-slug to sequence number at snapshot time.

compost_state_surface.title: Compost State Surface Record
compost_state_surface.description: A single tracked surface captured in a .compost snapshot.

slug.description: Unique surface identifier within the compost file.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the surface content.

content.description: Base64-encoded UTF-8 content of the surface.

seq.description: Sequence number of this surface at snapshot time.

compost_footer.title: Compost Footer Record
compost_footer.description: Last line of a .compost file. Integrity check for the full snapshot.

surface_count.description: Number of state_surface records in this snapshot.

checksum.description: SHA-256 of all state record content_hash values concatenated in record order.

delta_record.title: Progressive Version Delta Record
delta_record.description: A single mutation event for a tracked surface, written before the mutation is applied.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for this surface.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the mutation.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of new content. Required for write ops.

content.description: Base64-encoded new content. Required for write ops.

sandbox_operation.title: Sandbox Operation Descriptor
sandbox_operation.description: Describes a single draft-before-write or backup-before-mutate operation.

target_path.description: Path of the active surface being protected.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the operation.

vault_state_boundary.title: Vault State Boundary Descriptor
vault_state_boundary.description: Declares what surfaces are crash-safe vs discard-safe for a given vault configuration.

crash_safe_surfaces.description: Surface slugs that must survive any kill signal.

discard_safe_patterns.description: Glob patterns for regenerable files that may be discarded after a crash.

compost_rotation_keep.description: Number of .compost files to retain. Default: 3.

delta_retention_minimum.description: Minimum number of deltas to retain per surface regardless of snapshot state. Default: 10.
